explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.findings: Sources mention the inclusion of safeguards against bias in their AI practices.
fairness.path_to_improvement: Publish bias testing results, outcome monitoring, or vendor fairness certifications.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for fairness, governance, privacy, and transparency in responsible AI. It supports fairness by mentioning safeguards against bias and governance through product review as design principles. The release also indicates governance and privacy commitments by detailing licensing of AI model sources and ensuring copyright compliance, while transparency is supported by highlighting AI tool capabilities and the auditable nature of AI output.
relevant_sources.title: Dow Jones Risk & Compliance Deploys Gen AI for Due Diligence

governance.findings: Policy documents outline a formal mechanism to control content usage and mitigate copyright exposure amplified by AI. Sources also reference product review as a design principle for governance and mention outsourcing to vendors as part of governance practices.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: This policy document from News Corp Australia introduces a corporate copyright license to manage legal and compliance risks associated with AI tools. This initiative provides evidence for the **governance** pillar by establishing a formal mechanism to control content usage and mitigate copyright exposure amplified by AI.
relevant_sources.title: News Corp launches corporate copyright licence as AI raises compliance risk

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for fairness, governance, privacy, and transparency in responsible AI. It supports fairness by mentioning safeguards against bias and governance through product review as design principles. The release also indicates governance and privacy commitments by detailing licensing of AI model sources and ensuring copyright compliance, while transparency is supported by highlighting AI tool capabilities and the auditable nature of AI output.
relevant_sources.title: Dow Jones Risk & Compliance Deploys Gen AI for Due Diligence

relevant_sources.summary: This third-party report on HarperCollins' use of AI for book translations provides evidence for **governance, oversight, and transparency**. It supports transparency by detailing the use of AI tools for initial translation drafts and the expansion of this service. The report also indicates governance through the mention of outsourcing to vendors and supports oversight by describing the crucial step of human translators editing the AI-generated output.
relevant_sources.title: HarperCollins is using AI for book translations

oversight.findings: Reports describe the crucial step of human translators editing AI-generated output, indicating a form of oversight.
oversight.path_to_improvement: Publish override mechanisms, escalation processes, or appeal workflows.

privacy.findings: Sources detail the licensing of AI model sources as part of privacy commitments. They also reference ensuring copyright compliance within these commitments.
privacy.path_to_improvement: Publish AI-specific privacy impact assessments or data handling procedures.

transparency.findings: Sources highlight AI tool capabilities and reference the auditable nature of AI output. Reports also detail the use of AI tools for initial translation drafts and the expansion of these translation services.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Publish detailed documentation (model cards, system specs) for AI systems deployed.

summary.overall_findings: Based on 14 publicly available sources, News Corp.'s published materials address 5 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars. Oversight is documented through reports describing human translators editing AI-generated output, and transparency disclosures highlight AI tool capabilities. Additionally, privacy commitments detail the licensing of AI model sources, fairness materials mention safeguards against bias, and governance policy documents outline a formal mechanism to control content usage. No qualifying public evidence was found for explainability or external accountability.
